action: Generate one realistic AI video per genre using the assigned avatar and script.
fallback_action: retry video generation up to 5 times

recipe.steps: Generate a realistic AI video for the Politics genre using the assigned avatar and script: 1. Avatar ID: 3162 2. Script: "Here’s your quick update on Politics: 1. What is Doge and why is Musk stepping back? 2. Politics latest: Kemi Badenoch 'will not be Tory leader for very long'. 3. April 22, 2025 – Donald Trump presidency news."

Generate a realistic AI video for the Business genre using the assigned avatar and script: 1. Avatar ID: 3161 2. Script: "Here’s your quick update on Business: 1. Watch: Insider’s national business news headlines in under two minutes. 2. School Assembly News Headlines, 24 April 2025: National, International, Business and Sports Updates. 3. How actual ‘fake news’ caused a market whiplash."

Generate a realistic AI video for the Sports genre using the assigned avatar and script: 1. Avatar ID: 3156 2. Script: "Here’s your quick update on Sports: 1. Store the generated conv_ids in memory for future reference.
